name: 一层·大厅
description: 谭公馆一层的大厅，联通二层，可从二层走廊俯视。四盏大吊灯牢牢固定在二层房顶上，桌椅靠墙摆放。吕名然的尸体就悬吊在东北侧的吊灯上。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion grand hall with high ceiling, chandelier, Republican era Shanghai, oil painting style

name: 一层·厨房
description: 谭公馆的厨房，佣人们在此准备餐食。今天早上只来得及做简单的三明治。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion kitchen, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 一层·男仆房
description: 男仆的住所。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion servant quarters, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 一层·盥洗室
description: 盥洗室，佣人在此清洗衣物。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion laundry room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 一层·花园
description: 谭公馆的花园，种着许多曼陀罗花。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion garden with datura flowers, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 二层·家主房
description: 谭仁昌与罗明纱的卧室，内有浴室和小阳台。小阳台上有单人榻，谭仁昌的尸体就盘腿坐在此处。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion master bedroom with balcony, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 二层·海悠房
description: 海悠的房间，位于家主房隔壁。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion bedroom, young woman's room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 二层·尚致房
description: 尚致的房间。戴面具的女尸就倒在此处地面上，窗户从内锁上。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion study bedroom, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 二层·承格房
description: 承格的房间。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion bedroom, young man's room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 二层·大阳台
description: 二层的大阳台，能看到峭壁和大海。海鸟在此啄食地上的面包渣。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion balcony overlooking cliff and sea, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·女佣房
description: 女佣的住所。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion servant room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·药品房
description: 存放各种药物的房间，其中有贴着外文标签的黄色药瓶（麻醉药/曼陀罗制剂）。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion medicine room with bottles, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·杂物房
description: 存放杂物的房间，有竹制雀笼、洋火、蜡烛和绳子。西侧有一个上锁的柜子，通向密室。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion storage room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·密室
description: 杂物房西侧暗门后的密室，内有一张凌乱的结实大床，两侧都有暗门。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion secret room with bed, hidden doors, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·客房一
description: 已被搬空家具的房间，地上用朱砂画着七角形图案，七个角上有烧完的蜡迹，中间放着开膛的小鸟尸体。还有一把空火铳。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion room with occult pentagram on floor, candles, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·客房二
description: 客房，桌上有一份三明治。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion guest room, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·客房三
description: 客房，妇人（欣雅）的尸体倒在此处，太阳穴有圆孔伤口。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion guest room with body on floor, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·收藏室
description: 存放古董和遗物的房间，有匣子（内含火铳和黑火药）以及锋利的刀具。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion collection room with antiques, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·灵堂
description: 灵堂，用传统油灯和蜡烛照明，有浸油棉线作灯芯。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion ancestral shrine, oil lamps and candles, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·书库
description: 藏有各种翻译书籍，包括化学、神秘学、宗教、医学解剖等，其中有手抄本和Dr. Zebub的论文。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion library with books and manuscripts, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 三层·书房
description: 书房，书桌内有遗嘱草稿和保险文件。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion study room with desk, Republican era, oil painting style

name: 馆外·停车处
description: 谭公馆门外的停车处，车夫们在此等候。

visual.prompt: Chinese mansion exterior parking area with horse carriage, Republican era, oil painting style
